description: Granted AI provides searchable data on grants, foundations, and related funding intelligence. Its product helps researchers, nonprofits, and other organizations discover funding opportunities and research funders.
summary: Granted AI exposes a REST Data API at `https://grantedai.com/api/v1` authenticated with a Granted bearer API key, plus a public MCP server at `https://grantedai.com/api/mcp/mcp` with streamable HTTP transport and no authentication required.
